{{Quote|Glad to have you back, soldier. The Imperial Army is moving supplies through the city between their base and their troops. Stealing the supplies would not only be a great blow to their troops but those resources would be extremely valuable to us. We need some volunteers to ambush that convoy and we are hoping you'd be up for it.|Captain Klork to a Rebel|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Klork''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He participated in the [[Battle of Restuss]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Klork was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
